title: Singapore
factBoundary: Singapore uses a source-controlled RoamAtlas country pack. User-facing factual claims must stay backed by curated or official sources.

gardens.title: Gardens by the Bay official site

facts.text: Singapore is a confirmed RoamAtlas country pack in the current source-controlled dataset.

singapore.title: Singapore
singapore.artworkVisualContext: A restrained Singapore overview page with clear visual icon clusters for west-side NUS, NTU, and Jurong Lake Gardens; Marina Bay and Gardens by the Bay; Chinatown, Kampong Glam, and Little India; Sentosa; east-side Changi Airport, Jewel Changi, and East Coast Park; and north-side Mandai Wildlife Reserve and Singapore Zoo. Use large open water and green space, sparse roads, and short readable curated anchor labels only.

facts.text: Marina Bay is presented by URA as a waterfront district with major leisure destinations and civic space.

marina-bay-scroll.title: Marina Bay and Civic District
marina-bay-scroll.artworkVisualContext: A clean Marina Bay chapter page with Marina Bay Sands, Gardens by the Bay, waterfront paths, water, civic space, bridges, and short labels for major clickable subjects.

facts.text: This MVP groups NUS, NTU, and Jurong Lake Gardens as west-side curated exploration nodes.
This MVP groups Chinatown, Kampong Glam, and Little India as a culture-focused exploration belt.
Sentosa is Singapore's island resort destination and includes beaches, attractions, resorts, and leisure experiences.

sentosa-south-scroll.title: Sentosa and Southern Waterfront
sentosa-south-scroll.artworkVisualContext: A calm Sentosa and southern waterfront chapter page with beach, resort coast, green ridges, water, paths, and spacious visual clusters.

facts.text: This MVP groups Changi Airport, Jewel Changi, and East Coast Park as east-side curated exploration nodes.
This MVP uses Mandai as the confirmed wildlife deep-dive path.

nature-wildlife-scroll.title: Nature and Wildlife
nature-wildlife-scroll.artworkVisualContext: A nature and wildlife chapter page with Mandai wildlife, botanic gardens, parkland, water, forest edges, and clear sparse clickable clusters.

facts.text: Singapore Tourism Board identifies Marina Bay Sands as one of Singapore's two integrated resorts.

marina-bay-sands.title: Marina Bay Sands
marina-bay-sands.artworkVisualContext: A focused architectural study of Marina Bay Sands showing the rooftop deck, hotel towers, museum building, and waterfront podium as four distinct visual subjects.

facts.text: Gardens by the Bay describes itself as a garden destination with attractions including Cloud Forest, Flower Dome, Floral Fantasy, and Supertree Observatory.

gardens-by-the-bay.title: Gardens by the Bay
gardens-by-the-bay.artworkVisualContext: A focused Gardens by the Bay planning illustration with glass conservatories, Supertree Grove, Cloud Forest, Flower Dome, paths, lawns, water, and short callout labels.

facts.text: Supertree Grove is included as a curated Gardens by the Bay drill-down node for the RoamAtlas demo path.

supertree-grove.title: Supertree Grove
supertree-grove.artworkVisualContext: A Supertree Grove encyclopedia-style page with several Supertrees, canopy forms, garden paths, an optional elevated walkway, and diagram-like short labels.

facts.text: Flower Dome is included as a curated Gardens by the Bay drill-down node for the RoamAtlas demo path.
Cloud Forest is included as a curated Gardens by the Bay drill-down node for the RoamAtlas demo path.
This structure plate is a general visual explanation, not proof of hidden structural details.
Merlion Park is included as a curated photo stop in the Marina Bay demo path.
Chinatown is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Kampong Glam is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Little India is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Sentosa Island is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Southern Ridges is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
NUS is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
NTU is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Jurong Lake Gardens is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Changi Airport is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Jewel Changi is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Singapore Botanic Gardens is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
East Coast Park is included as a curated RoamAtlas first-slice point of interest.
Mandai Wildlife Reserve presents itself as Singapore's wildlife destination with multiple wildlife attractions.

mandai-scroll.title: Mandai Wildlife Reserve
mandai-scroll.artworkVisualContext: A Mandai Wildlife Reserve planning illustration with zoo entry, wildlife landscape zones, visitor paths, water, pavilions, shade, and restrained guide labels.

facts.text: Singapore Zoo is an official Mandai Wildlife Reserve attraction.
Mandai describes Singapore Zoo as home to over 4,200 animals.

singapore-zoo.title: Singapore Zoo
singapore-zoo.artworkVisualContext: A Singapore Zoo chapter page with habitat zones, visitor paths, shaded planting, water, pavilions, animals suggested as simple visual forms, and short zone labels.

facts.text: Mandai's admission add-ons list giraffe, zebra, and white rhino feeding experiences at Wild Africa.
Primate Kingdom is included as a zoo-zone node for the RoamAtlas demo path.
Fragile Forest is included as a zoo-zone node for the RoamAtlas demo path.
Giraffe is confirmed in the current Singapore Zoo Wild Africa demo path from Mandai's official feeding listing.
Giraffes are herbivorous mammals known for long necks and high browsing behavior.
White rhino is confirmed in the current Wild Africa demo path from Mandai's official feeding listing.
Zebra is confirmed in the current Wild Africa demo path from Mandai's official feeding listing.
Mandai's Singapore Zoo visitor page names orangutans among wildlife guests may meet.
Colobus monkey content is included as general encyclopedia background until attraction-specific sourcing is reviewed.
Ring-tailed lemur content is included as general encyclopedia background until attraction-specific sourcing is reviewed.
Two-toed sloth content is included as general encyclopedia background until attraction-specific sourcing is reviewed.
The anatomy plate is general biology content, not proof of a specific live exhibit.

singapore-overview.title: Singapore Overview Scroll
singapore-overview.visualContext: A simplified Singapore overview with visual icon clusters for west-side NUS, NTU, and Jurong Lake Gardens; Marina Bay and Gardens by the Bay; heritage districts; Sentosa; east-side Changi Airport, Jewel Changi, and East Coast Park; and north-side Mandai Wildlife Reserve and Singapore Zoo. Use open water, garden districts, calm roads, bridges, transit lines, modern towers, and spacious green areas.
singapore-overview.continuityPromptTemplate: This tile is part of a larger panoramic Singapore scroll. Scene: {title}. Tile position: row {row}, column {column} of {rows} x {columns}. Keep paper texture, line weight, lighting, perspective, and density consistent. Do not add readable labels, fake signs, ticket prices, opening hours, or official logos.
